name: Ensure Kinesis Data Streams use encryption at rest
body:
### Security intent

This control protects cryptographic boundaries by ensuring that **kinesis Data Streams use encryption at rest**.

### Key state reviewed

The assessment reviews kinesis Data Streams not using encryption at rest in AWS. It focuses on key access, lifecycle, rotation, deletion, exposure, or encryption usage depending on the control.

### Specialist guidance

Encryption controls should be remediated with dependency awareness. Before disabling, rotating, deleting, or replacing a key, confirm which services use it, validate decrypt paths, and keep old key material available until dependent workloads are safely migrated.
description: Kinesis Data Streams not using encryption at rest
remediationDescription:
## AWS remediation

### Console
1. Open Kinesis Data Stream.
2. Enable at-rest encryption with KMS.

### AWS CLI
~~~bash
aws kinesis start-stream-encryption \
  --stream-name <stream-name> \
  --encryption-type KMS \
  --key-id <kms-key-id-or-arn>
~~~

### References
- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/streams/latest/dev/what-is-sse.html
- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/reference/kinesis/start-stream-encryption.html
